mechanism_narrative: A positive short-term trend in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue momentum for index constituents, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by lower 20-day S&P 500 returns with Rank IC below 0 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid CPI increase while the federal funds rate remains near zero raises expected policy tightening and discount-rate pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 1-month change crosses above +0.5% while FEDFUNDS < 0.25%
regime_hint: inflation shock with policy rate at lower bound
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or mean triggered return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A falling unemployment rate with expanding payrolls signals tight labor markets, wage-pressure risk, and higher expected policy rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses below 4.2% while PAYEMS 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the UNRATE-below-threshold and PAYEMS-positive state is not followed by below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of walk-forward instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum has a negative 60-day return coefficient after walk-forward estimation or Rank IC stays below 0.03 for 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction-linked earnings weakness, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or no return underperformance versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: An upward trend in the federal funds rate increases the discount rate applied to equity cash flows and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if months with rising FEDFUNDS have higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than months with flat or falling FEDFUNDS in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales combined with high housing starts identifies broad private demand strength that lifts revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month change is positive and HOUST crosses above 1600
regime_hint: early-to-mid expansion with strong private demand
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-positive and HOUST-above-1600 state has a nonpositive average 5-day S&P 500 return or hit rate below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP and industrial production rise together, broad real activity expansion raises expected earnings breadth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 1-quarter change is positive and INDPRO 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if joint positive GDPC1 and INDPRO growth fails to outperform unconditional 60-day S&P 500 returns by at least 25 basis points on average.
